title: Crisis Pregnancy Hotlines - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Health Care > Crisis Pregnancy Hotlines 5 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF 211INFO 211INFO MATERNAL AND CHILD HEALTH PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF 211info's Maternal and Child Health Program provides specialized information, referral, and follow-up services to individuals and family members of all genders covering needs and questions related to pregnancy, maternal and child health, sexual and reproductive health, and women's health across the life span, including resources for women with breast cancer. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm Email 211 Visit Website More Details ALL-OPTIONS ALL-OPTIONS TALKLINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a confidential space to talk about pregnancy, parenting, abortion, and adoption. Peer counselors offer judgment-free support at any point before, during, and after pregnancy, regardless of which options the caller is considering. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-10pm, Saturday-Sunday 7am-3pm Email (888) 493-0092 Visit Website More Details ALL-OPTIONS FAITH ALOUD SPIRITUAL CARE LINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers confidential spiritual support related to pregnancy, parenting, abortion, and adoption. Spiritual care counselors offer support at any point before, during, and after pregnancy, regardless of which options the caller is considering. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday/Wednesday/Friday 8am-3pm, Saturday-Sunday 9am-noon Email (888) 717-5010 Visit Website More Details NATIONAL SAFE HAVEN ALLIANCE CRISIS PREGNANCY HOTLINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF The National Safe Haven Alliance (NSHA) is a national non-profit organization that promotes safe alternatives for parents in crisis pregnancy situations. The crisis hotline provides support and direction for parents and providers regarding the Safe Haven law, including Safe Surrender locations, adoption resources and parenting support. Also, it provides direct resources to assist and prevent infant abandonment. The hotline is staffed by social workers, nurses, and paramedics that have received comprehensive training and are able to support, and assist parents and providers. PO Box 12631 Glendale, AZ 85318 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (888) 510-2229 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OPEN ADOPTION & FAMILY SERVICES OPEN ADOPTION & FAMILY SERVICES EUGENE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Supports pregnant women and couples in making informed decisions about pregnancy options, including parenting, abortion, and adoption. Open adoptions offer ongoing visits and lifelong services. 1590 Willamette Street Suite 217 Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Expectant parents Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm. On-call counselor available evenings and weekends for time-sensitive pregnancy options counseling and client work. Email (541) 343-4825 - Get Directions Visit Website More Details OPEN ADOPTION & FAMILY SERVICES OPEN ADOPTION & FAMILY SERVICES PORTLAND Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Supports pregnant women and couples in making informed decisions about pregnancy options, including parenting, abortion, and adoption.
